source_pr.title: store/tikv: remove TestFailPrewriteRegionError
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
The test runs too slow when `-race` is enabled, while it tests nothing when `-race` is disabled. So being removed is its best fate.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
Remove test.

### Check List
Tests 
- Manual test
- 
### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: The test runs too slow when `-race` is enabled, while it tests nothing when `-race` is disabled. So being removed is its best fate.
failure_signature: The test runs too slow when `-race` is enabled, while it tests nothing when `-race` is disabled. So being removed is its best fate.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes a unit test because it is too slow under `-race` and provides little value without `-race` (a quarantine/removal decision). The case data does not include a specific flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization mechanism beyond removal, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient evidence rather than guessing a root cause category.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: The test runs too slow when `-race` is enabled, while it tests nothing when `-race` is disabled. So being removed is its best fate.
